title: Sleep Accelerator
description: A plugin that allows you to skip the night smoothly
body:
# SleepAccelerator
# Speed up the night skip in multiplayer based on the number of sleeping players!

## Overview

SleepAccelerator is a lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin designed to make night skipping more dynamic and fair in multiplayer worlds.

Instead of requiring all players to sleep or skipping at a fixed speed, this plugin speeds up the night proportionally to the number of players in bed.

### Features
 • Smooth night skipping based on the number of sleeping players
 • Fully server-side (no mods required for players)
 • Lightweight and efficient
 • Plug and play — no configuration needed

### How it works

The more players sleep, the faster time passes:
 • 1 player = 2× time speed
 • 2 players = 4× time speed
 • 3 players = 6× time speed
 • …and so on!

This makes it fair for servers where not everyone goes to bed, and still keeps the gameplay flowing.

### Installation
 1. Download the latest .jar file from Modrinth.
 2. Place it in your server’s /plugins/ directory.
 3. Restart or reload your server.
 4. Done!

Compatibility
 • Server type: PaperMC (not Bukkit or Spigot officially tested)

License

MIT License — free to use, modify, and distribute.

Planned Features
 • Configurable speed multipliers
 • Messages on night skip
 • ActionBar sleep status
 • Config
